pi_items.source: Task setup script, environment directory structure, and SUMO documentation confirm the scenario name is bologna_pasubio.
Confirmed by task setup script (which removes any old version of this file), export_result.sh (which exports it), and verifier.py (which parses it for XML routing).
Confirmed by export_result.sh (which reads from this location to export the report) and verifier.py (which extracts the metrics from it).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world 'bologna_pasubio' SUMO scenario, modeling traffic in Bologna, Italy. Code analysis confirms the environment enforces the creation of a custom route file strictly at '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_freight.rou.xml'. It also strictly requires extracting the trip duration and route length into a text report located precisely at '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/freight_report.txt'. Both paths are verified as accurately represented in the metadata.
